arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Kendra query suggestions block list.

created_at.description: The date and time when the query suggestions block list was created.

description.description: A description of the Kendra query suggestions block list.

error_message.description: An error message if there is an issue with the block list.

file_size_bytes.description: The size of the block list file in bytes.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Kendra query suggestions block list.

item_count.description: The number of items in the query suggestions block list.

name.description: The name of the Kendra query suggestions block list.

role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that gives Amazon Kendra permissions to access the block list.

source_s3_path.description: The S3 path where the block list file is stored.

status.description: The current status of the Kendra query suggestions block list.

tags.description: A map of tags for categorizing and organizing the block list.

updated_at.description: The date and time when the block list was last updated.
